name: asaancare
description: AsaanCare — Telemedicine platform for Pakistan. Admin, API, Doctor App, Patient App.

scripts.dev: cd platform && PORT=3000 pnpm --filter @asaancare/api-server run dev & PORT=5000 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @asaancare/admin-dashboard run dev
scripts.dev:api: cd platform && PORT=3000 pnpm --filter @asaancare/api-server run dev
scripts.dev:admin: cd platform && PORT=5000 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @asaancare/admin-dashboard run dev
scripts.build: cd platform && pnpm --filter @asaancare/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @asaancare/admin-dashboard run build
scripts.typecheck: cd platform && pnpm --filter @asaancare/api-server run typecheck && pnpm --filter @asaancare/admin-dashboard run typecheck
